title: L  Day
compiled_truth: L  Day is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-05-24 to 2002-02-28), L  Day sent 29 and received 328 emails, totalling 357 interactions. Top correspondents: [M  Forney](people/m-forney) (16), [Jeffrey Miller](people/jeffrey-miller) (10), [Doug Gilbert-Smith](people/doug-gilbert-smith) (10), [Clint Dean](people/clint-dean) (8), [Mike Curry](people/mike-curry) (6).
